message:
test(oracle): add 20 conformance tests s82a-s82t (prepared-stmt ceremony regression guards)

Targeted probes for bd-cg732 ceremony-gating optimizations: rapid
sequential UPDATE (s82a), interleaved multi-table DML (s82b), explicit
txn multi-UPDATE (s82c), DELETE with IN subquery (s82d), UPDATE with
CASE (s82e), INSERT OR REPLACE (s82f), UPDATE with correlated subquery
(s82g), DELETE WHERE NOT EXISTS (s82h), multi-column SET (s82i), INSERT
SELECT aggregate (s82j), txn rollback (s82k), nested savepoints (s82l),
UPDATE then verify (s82m), DELETE all + reinsert (s82n), INSERT OR
IGNORE UNIQUE (s82o), FK CASCADE multi-level (s82p), math functions
(s82q), complex boolean WHERE (s82r), CTE + verify (s82s), recursive
CTE hierarchy (s82t). All 20 pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
